features.name: attribute annotation on port declaration
features.description: Code should include a Verilog attribute annotation (* key = "value" *) placed directly before a port declaration (input/output) inside a module

features.name: attribute annotation mid-expression in continuous assignment
features.description: Code should include a continuous assign statement where a (* ... *) attribute annotation appears between binary operands inside the RHS expression

features.name: attribute annotation between unary operator and operand
features.description: Code should include a continuous assign where a (* ... *) attribute annotation is placed between a unary operator (such as !) and its operand
